main.name: Shaikh Adima Zareen
main.shortDesc: Computer Science graduate passionate about AI, Machine Learning, RAG systems, Python development, and building impactful software solutions.

about.title: Software Developer
about.about: I am a Bachelor of Computer Science graduate passionate about building intelligent, user-focused software solutions. My interests lie in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Python development, and modern full-stack technologies. Over the years, I have worked on projects involving Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Flask, React Native, OpenCV, and database technologies. I enjoy transforming complex ideas into practical applications that solve real-world problems and deliver meaningful user experiences.From developing AI-powered document question-answering systems to creating offline emergency communication applications, I am constantly exploring innovative ways to combine technology and creativity. I believe in writing clean, scalable code and continuously improving my skills through hands-on projects and lifelong learning.I am always eager to collaborate, learn new technologies, and contribute to impactful solutions that make a difference.

projects.name: Offline Emergency Alert App
projects.techstack: React Native, Google Nearby Connections API, SQLite, Flask
description: Developed secure peer-to-peer emergency communication and alert sharing without internet connectivity.
Built a decentralized mesh networking system with local storage and cloud synchronization.
Designed scalable alert monitoring capable of handling 10,000+ concurrent emergency alerts.

projects.name: LangChain PDF Q&A System
description: Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline for PDF-based question answering.
Improved contextual response accuracy by approximately 90% using FAISS vector search.
Reduced manual document lookup time by nearly 70% through automated semantic retrieval.

projects.name: Quran Video Creator Web Application
projects.techstack: Flask, MongoDB, MoviePy, Python, REST APIs
description: Developed a web platform for automatic Quran recitation video generation.
Integrated synchronized Arabic text, English translations and audio rendering.
Reduced manual video editing effort by nearly 80% while supporting 100+ Surahs.

projects.name: Image-to-Video Animation Tool
description: Created a tool that converts static images into animated videos using zoom and pan effects.
Implemented smooth transitions and dynamic resolution scaling.
Added support for JPG, PNG and RGBA-to-RGB conversion for export compatibility.

desc: Crafted compelling resumes and optimized LinkedIn profiles for clients across various industries.
Conducted personalized consultations to understand clients' career goals and tailor their professional branding.
Utilized industry-specific keywords and best practices to enhance clients' visibility and appeal to recruiters.
Received positive feedback from clients, resulting in increased job interview opportunities and career advancements.
Built OpenCV-based face, hand and glasses detection systems.
Enhanced password generation security using cryptographic methods.
Developed Python automation tools and Telegram bots.
Created data visualization solutions using NumPy and Matplotlib.

services.title: Resume Writing & LinkedIn Optimization
services.description: Craft compelling resumes and optimize LinkedIn profiles to enhance professional branding and career opportunities.

services.title: Portfolio Website Development
services.description: Design and develop responsive portfolio websites to showcase your skills, projects, and achievements.

services.title: AI & RAG Development
services.description: Build custom AI assistants, RAG pipelines, LangChain applications and document Q&A systems.

services.title: Python Development
services.description: Develop automation tools, APIs, web applications and data processing solutions.
